content: Fontsource (npm-installable, per-weight/style packages, tree-shakeable, offline, zero external requests) is the standard for self-hosting in bundler-based projects like Astro. Manual subsetting (pyftsubset/glyphhanger + woff2) gives finer control over glyph ranges/OpenType features and can beat Fontsource's file size when only 1-2 weights are needed. For a portfolio with a small, fixed glyph set (Latin + numerals + a few symbols) manual subsetting of 2-3 weights is worth the one-time cost; Fontsource is the fallback for convenience.
